team_name: AI-Based Tender Evaluation & Explainable Eligibility Analysis Platform
summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender evaluation, understands bidder eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Identification and structuring of eligibility criteria
Matching of bidder data against eligibility criteria
Production of explanatory reports linking criterion, extracted value, and source document
optimization_claims: Handles ambiguity while maintaining human oversight
Operates within existing procurement workflows without requiring changes to current processes
Scalability across multiple departments and types of tenders
constraints_addressed: Complex legal language spread across multiple pages
Inconsistencies in evaluation due to different evaluators interpreting the same documents differently
Difficulty in auditing decisions because they are not always clearly traceable to specific pieces of evidence
